series_metadata.series_title: Public Employer (PE) Request for Variances and Undue Hardships
series_metadata.series_description: A Public Employer (PE) unable to comply with an adopted or proposed Public Employment Risk Reduction Program (PERRP) standard may apply for a temporary variance of the standard by providing a justification as to why they are unable to comply and specify what, if any, hardship they will incur in complying with the PERRP standard. The application must include a statement of the steps the PE will take or has taken to comply with Ohio PERRP standards.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Remain on file application has been fulfilled and any extensions have been exhausted. administrator may renew an order issued up two times provided that requirements of approved variance application are met and public employer files an application renewal with administrator at least ninety days prior expiration date of order
